pr_title: feat: consolidate deduplicate_levers with classification and safety valve fix
pr_description: Split flat `keep` into `primary`/`secondary` classification for downstream prioritization Narrow the safety valve to fix llama3.1 blanket-keep (14-15/15 kept) and gpt-4o-mini over-inclusion (10-12/15): replace "Use keep if you lack understanding" with calibration hint ("expect 4-8 absorb/remove in 15 levers") Add concrete secondary lever examples (marketing timing, reporting cadence, communication tooling, documentation formatting) Fix B3: `...` appended unconditionally in compact history even when justification isn't truncated Add `OPTIMIZE_INSTRUCTIONS` documenting 4 known failure modes (blanket-primary, over-inclusion, hierarchy-direction errors, chain absorption) Add `deduplicate_levers` step to self_improve runner Backwards-compatible: `enrich_potential_levers.py` accepts optional `classification` field
